case_title: STATE OF OREGON, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE vs. MATTHEWS, ERIC E.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF OREGON, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DIRECTOR OF THE EMPLOYMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, ERIC E.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF OREGON, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DIRECTOR OF THE EMPLOYMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, ERIC E. $1,686.04 PRINCIPAL, $189.70 INTEREST, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,964.74 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
